Localization.Description: Power management of the virtual machine guest OSs

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} shut down the guest OS of virtual machine "{datafield5}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} put into the standby mode the guest OS of virtual machine "{datafield5}" on host {event_src.host}
The launch of unsupported OS {object.value} on virtual machine "{datafield5}" is detected on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} restarted the guest OS of virtual machine "{datafield5}" on host {event_src.host}
